resources.string: Media library available on your network
Installing server files (first launch can take 1–2 min)…
Allow file access so Rollo can read and save media in Internal storage/Rollo/Videos
When off, photos and videos stay private and hidden from Samsung Gallery. When on, media in Rollo/Videos appears in your Gallery app.
Videos folder is visible in Gallery
Videos folder is hidden from Gallery
Prevents Android from stopping the server. On Samsung also set Apps → Rollo → Battery → Unrestricted.
Allow Rollo to ignore battery optimization so the server keeps running in the background.
Download the latest server code from GitHub. Restart the app after updating.
Send a link so others can open your library on the same Wi‑Fi or via Tailscale.
Use Tailscale IP from the Tailscale app for access away from home (port %1$d).
Check node.log in app storage or tap Retry after rebuilding the APK with npm run sync:android.
Replace YOUR-TAILSCALE-IP with the IP shown in the Tailscale app for this phone.
